name: Ooh!Media Limited
analysis: OML has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.4450, stop A$1.2276, target A$2.0972 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
